title: 8 herbal essential oils for cough in asthma patients
description: Mentha x piperita essential oils, commonly known as peppermint oil, is a natural remedy for coughs. It helps because of its decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling in the nasal passages and ease breathing. The main constituents responsible for these effects are menthol, menthone, and limonene. When inhaled, menthol and menthone cool the nasal passages and thin mucus, making it easier to cough up.
